title: Smoky Moroccan Rice Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful one-pot dish perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of smoky in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 teaspoon of savory and 2 teaspoons of moroccan, stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of rice and 1/2 cup of noodles, stir to coat with spice mixture.
Add 1 cup of khlea and stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff with a fork and serve.
